findings.summary: 5 root causes identified: RC-1 (dangling IPC channel get-desktop-plugin-config — BLOCKER), RC-2 (PluginKind missing 'desktop'), RC-3 (DesktopPluginProvider not wired in renderer), RC-4 (no dialog UI), RC-5 (preload types untyped, no set handler)
